6:
WITH min_total AS (
  SELECT MIN(total_consumption) AS min_total
  FROM (
    SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
      AND y.Date LIKE '2013%'
    GROUP BY y.CustomerID
  )
),
min_customers AS (
  SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption, c.Segment
  FROM yearmonth y
  JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
    AND y.Date LIKE '2013%'
  GROUP BY y.CustomerID, c.Segment
  HAVING total_consumption = (SELECT min_total FROM min_total)
),
seg_avg AS (
  SELECT Segment, AVG(total_consumption) AS avg_consumption
  FROM min_customers
  GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='SME') -
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='LAM') AS diff_sme_lam,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='LAM') -
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='KAM') AS diff_lam_kam,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='KAM') -
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='SME') AS diff_kam_sme;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT Segment FROM (
   WITH seg_consumption AS (
      SELECT c.Segment,
             SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2012,
             SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons_2013
      FROM yearmonth ym
      JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
      WHERE ym.Date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2013-12-31'
        AND c.Currency = 'EUR'
        AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
      GROUP BY c.Segment
   ),
   seg_growth AS (
      SELECT Segment,
             CASE WHEN cons_2012 = 0 THEN NULL
                  ELSE (cons_2013 - cons_2012) / cons_2012 * 100.0 END AS pct_growth
      FROM seg_consumption
   )
   SELECT Segment FROM seg_growth WHERE pct_growth = (SELECT MAX(pct_growth) FROM seg_growth)
   UNION ALL
   SELECT Segment FROM seg_growth WHERE pct_growth = (SELECT MIN(pct_growth) FROM seg_growth)
)	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp ON disp.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN account a ON a.account_id = disp.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND d.district_id = (SELECT district_id FROM district ORDER BY A10 ASC LIMIT 1)
  AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date)
                      FROM client
                      WHERE gender = 'F'
                        AND district_id = (SELECT district_id FROM district ORDER BY A10 ASC LIMIT 1));	----- bird -----	financial
496: SELECT AVG(l.amount) FROM loan l WHERE l.status = 'A' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM trans t WHERE t.account_id = l.account_id);	----- bird -----	financial
497:
SELECT c.client_id,
       c.gender,
       (julianday('now') - julianday(c.birth_date)) AS age,
       cr.card_id,
       cr.type AS card_type
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card cr ON d.disp_id = cr.disp_id
WHERE cr.type = 'gold'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM loan l WHERE l.account_id = d.account_id AND l.status = 'A');	----- bird -----	financial
498:
SELECT a.account_id, d.A2 AS district_name, d.A3 AS region
FROM account a
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM trans t WHERE t.account_id = a.account_id);	----- bird -----	financial
